2026-03-03PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment of a Senior Advisor, Global Affairs CanadaAppointment of Robert Stewart of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada, to be styled as Deputy Minister responsible to lead the creation of the new Financial Crimes Agency, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada
precis: Appointment of Robert Stewart of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Senior Advisor, Global Affairs Canada, to be styled as Deputy Minister responsible to lead the creation of the new Financial Crimes Agency, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
